targets.expr: sum by (job, serviceName, serviceType, operation, username) (rate(requests_failed_total{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username"}[5m]))/ sum by (job, serviceName, serviceType, operation, username) (rate(requests_total{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username"}[5m]))*100>0

topk(20, sum by (job, serviceName, serviceType) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_sum{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m]))  / sum by (job, serviceName, serviceType) (rate ( requests_response_time_seconds_count{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))>0

panels.title: Avg Response Time by Service (sec)  - top 20

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (job, username) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_sum{job=~"$job",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m]))  / sum by (job, username) (rate ( requests_response_time_seconds_count{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))>0

panels.title: Avg Response Time by User (sec) - top 20

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (job,serviceName, serviceType, username, operation) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_sum{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m]))  / sum by (job, serviceName, serviceType, username, operation) (rate ( requests_response_time_seconds_count{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))>0

panels.title: Avg Response Time by Service, User, Operation (sec)  - top 20

targets.expr: topk(50, sum by (job, serviceType) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_bucket{le="0.05", job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m]))  / sum by (job,serviceType) (rate ( requests_response_time_seconds_count{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))*100>0

topk(50, sum by (job, serviceType) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_bucket{le="5.0", job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m]))  / sum by (job,serviceType) (rate ( requests_response_time_seconds_count{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))*100>0

topk(50, sum by (job, serviceType) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_bucket{le="1.0", job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType"}[5m]))  / sum by (job,serviceType) (rate ( requests_response_time_seconds_count{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))*100>0

panels.title: Total Time Used by Service, User, Operation (sec/sec)
Total Requests in last 24 hrs by Service (req)
Total Requests in last 24 hrs by User (req)

targets.expr: topk(10,sum by (job, serviceType, serviceName, username, operation) (increase( requests_response_time_seconds_sum{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",username=~"$username", operation=~"$operation",operation=~"^.+$"}[1d])))>0
